steps.t: The war-camp called Annâk-khurfu is north-west of the bridge between the Wells of Langflood and Elderslade, and serves as a gathering place for the ar…
The war camp is bustling with dwarves preparing for their upcoming assault on Gundabad. You should speak to the dwarves assembled on the lower level o…
The war camp is bustling with dwarves preparing for their upcoming assault on Gundabad. You should speak to the dwarves assembled on the upper level o…
Durin is on the upper level of Annâk-khurfu, addressing the assembled force of the dwarves.
